title: Mayor Owens Releases Proposed FY27 City of Syracuse Budget
summary: Mayor Sharon F. Owens submitted a $354.5 million proposed FY27 budget emphasizing fiscal responsibility, transparency, and targeted investments in housing, youth workforce development, and constituent services. The plan maintains zero property tax increases, includes a 4% water rate increase, and projects General Fund revenues of $330.6 million with $12 million net growth. The Common Council will review and act on the final budget by May 8, 2027.
department_refs: Department of Permits and Development Services

political_signal.description: Mayor prioritizes housing, youth employment, workforce development, and infrastructure modernization (transportation mobility coordination, third-party permitting) as strategic growth investments. Emphasis on fiscal discipline (no property tax increase) paired with service expansion signals pro-growth, constituent-focused governance.
